title: aliso_viejo_2025 (window 0)
text:
CITY OF ALISO VIEJO 
PUBLIC NOTICE 
ADOPTION OF ORDINANCE 
 
NOTICE IS HEREBY GIVEN that at their August 20, 2025 Regular Meeting, the City 
Council of the City of Aliso Viejo adopted the following Ordinance entitled:  
 
ORDINANCE NO. 2025-246 
 
AN ORDINANCE OF THE CITY COUNCIL OF THE CITY OF ALISO VIEJO, 
CALIFORNIA, AMENDING CHAPTERS 13.02 AND 13.04 OF TITLE 13 OF 
THE ALISO VIEJO MUNICIPAL CODE AND ADOPTING BY REFERENCE 
THE FOLLOWING MODEL CODES INTO THE ALISO VIEJO MUNICIPAL 
CODE: (1) CALIFORNIA BUILDING CODE, VOLUMES 1 & 2, 2025 
EDITION; WITH AMENDMENTS (2) CALIFORNIA ELECTRICAL CODE, 
2025 EDITION; (3) CALIFORNIA PLUMBING CODE, 2025 EDITION; (4) 
CALIFORNIA MECHANICAL CODE, 2025 EDITION; (5) INTERNATIONAL 
PROPERTY MAINTENANCE CODE, 2024 EDITION; (6) CALIFORNIA 
ADMINISTRATIVE CODE, 2025 EDITION; (7) CALIFORNIA ENERGY 
CODE, 2025 EDITION; (8) CALIFORNIA REFERENCED STANDARDS 
CODE, 2025 EDITION; (9) CALIFORNIA EXISTING BUILDING CODE, 
2025 EDITION; (10) CALIFORNIA RESIDENTIAL CODE, 2025 EDITION, 
WITH 
AMENDMENTS; 
(11) 
CALIFORNIA 
GREEN 
BUILDING 
STANDARDS CODE, 2025 EDITION; (12) CALIFORNIA WILDLAND 
URBAN INTERFACE CODE, 2025 EDITION, WITH AMENDMENTS; AND 
(13) CALIFORNIA FIRE CODE, 2025 EDITION, WITH AMENDMENTS 
 
Ordinance 2025-246 adopts by reference the 2025 California Building Standards Code 
with amendments that are tailored to the safety needs of the City of Aliso Viejo.  The 
recommended amendments are due to local conditions within the City, are of an 
administrative or procedural nature, are regarding subjects not covered by the Code or 
are reasonably necessary to safeguard life and property within the City. 
 
Said Ordinance was adopted by the following roll call vote:    
 
Ayes: Mayor Ackley, Mayor Pro Tem Duncan, Councilmembers Hurt, Munzing and 
Zandbergen 
Noes: None 
Absent: None 
 
The Ordinance shall take effect thirty (30) days after adoption, and is available for review 
in the office of the City Clerk, City of Aliso Viejo, 12 Jo

Zandbergen

Dated:  August 21, 2025 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
    
s/JANET MARTINEZ, CITY CLERK 
            
Publish:   
Laguna Niguel News 
 
 
August 28, 2025
